content.full_text:
June 4, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission
Legal Department
Post Office Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Legal Department:

On April 24, 1991, we attended an FPPC informational meeting in Visalia. At this time we were informed that all officeholders (special districts and schools) should file a short Form 470 if they were paid at least $100 per month any time during a calendar year.

We have requested that the districts comply with a list of any persons who may need to file Form 470. We have not been able to site a code section that completely satisfies questions we have received from the districts concerning this issue.

Please send us a written statement that will help us to clarify this requirement.

Yours truly,

Elizabeth Ford
Deputy Clerk
